title: Kochorie 60 Pieces Pastel Rainbow Paper Cups 8 Oz-9 Oz Disposable Pink Paper Party Cups for Hot and Cold Beverages Coloured Drinking Cup for DIY, Holiday Parties, Picnics, and Weddings, 6 Colors
features: Practical party supplies: this set includes 60 disposable paper cups (8 oz-9 oz each) in 6 pastel colors: soft blue, gentle green, light yellow, peach, light purple, and soft pink (10 cups per color); each party cup measures 3.4 inches/8.7 cm in height with a top diameter of 3 inches/7.5 cm, making them ideal for serving juice, water, and other beverages at parties, gatherings, or events

Pastel rainbow design: featuring a soft rainbow palette, these paper cups add a cheerful and inviting touch to any event without being too flashy; our colorful cups can also be used as drink cups or for creative DIY projects; you can decorate these party cups with flowers, trees, or any patterns your imagination inspires

Easy to clean: these pastel rainbow paper cups are lightweight and convenient to carry, making them suitable for serving guests or enjoying a treat yourself; their disposable design means no washing up is required, allowing you to spend more time enjoying your event and less time cleaning

Food-grade safe, sturdy & leak-proof: made from premium food-grade paper and coated with a food-safe film, these party paper cups are durable and leak-resistant; ideal for both hot and cold beverages, our disposable cups won’t easily deform or leak, so you can use them with confidence at any event

Wide range of uses: these party cups are great for daily use at home, in the office, at weddings, parties, family gatherings, barbecues, camping, picnics, and both indoor and outdoor events; their stylish design and durable construction make them a versatile addition to any occasion
